reviews.comment:

Great place for a rest stop, outdoor tables and a place for pets.

reviews.comment:
Aparte del combustible hay un parque grande con árboles mesas y juegos para niños todo muy limpio buen lugar para hacer una parada

(Translated by Google)
Besides the gas station, there's a large park with trees, tables, and a children's playground—all very clean, a good place to stop.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, me ayudaron con un problema con el auto.Ademas hay un lugar amplio y arbolado para hacer un alto en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; they helped me with a car problem. Plus, there's a spacious, wooded area to take a break during your trip.
